en: It's just some guy I work with.
Come on, you're going out with a guy.
There's gotta be something wrong with him.
So does she have a hump and a hairpiece?
Just because I don't want her to go through what I went through with Carl.
Okay, everybody relax. This is not even a date.
It's just two people going to dinner and...
Sounds like a date to me.
